name: Profit Loss Waterfall
description: Financial waterfall chart showing revenue, expenses, and net profit with staggered bar animations.

fields.STAT_VALUE_2: Expense 1 value as negative number, e.g. -320
fields.STAT_VALUE_3: Expense 2 value as negative number, e.g. -180
fields.STAT_VALUE_4: Expense 3 value as negative number, e.g. -90
fields.STAT_VALUE_5: Net profit value as positive number, e.g. 260
